svg.title: Spreadsheet-Native Fulfillment

g.text: Pick, pack, manifest, and the final ship step stay a conveyor: queue left, active order pick table right, with bagging and output actions visibly adjacent.

svg.text: The queue keeps the fulfillment conveyor legible: what is packed, what is bagged, and what explicit action comes next.
Queue state must not blank after status changes. Selection remains row-scoped until one order is focused.
The selected order opens into one dominant item table with explicit pack, ready, and ship actions above the grid.
Pack, unpack, mark-all-packed, ready, and ship remain explicit actions tied to the focused order.
Client, route, and fulfillment evidence stay visible to the left so bagging never becomes a detached modal-first flow.
Bag counts, manifest export, and ship intent stay visibly adjacent under the active pick table so the next step is obvious.
The pick table stays primary. Manifest export and final ship confirmation live directly below it, not in a detached modal stack.

g.text: 5 orders in queue · 2 ready to ship
Selected SO-1038 · A select all unpacked · ] next page · Cmd/Ctrl+E export
Orders owns the pre-fulfillment workflow. Fulfillment owns the explicit pack, ready, manifest, and ship transitions.
